mapper.sql: id, username, real_name, email, phone, role, avatar, status, create_time, update_time
id, username, password, real_name, email, phone, role, avatar, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, COALESCE(#{role}, 2), COALESCE(#{status}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user username = #{username},password = #{password},real_name = #{realName},email = #{email},phone = #{phone},role = #{role},avatar = #{avatar},status = #{status}, WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
